  2. Tentang Kami

Tentang Kami

Description Here.

PT. TAN ESA GEMILANG hadir sebagai salah satu solusi logistik di Indonesia. Kami adalah mitra strategis yang berkomitmen untuk mendukung kesuksesan bisnis klien kami. Dengan pendekatan terpadu, dedikasi terhadap keunggulan, dan fokus pada kebutuhan klien, kami siap membantu Anda memenuhi tantangan logistik di dunia yang terus berubah ini.

Memanfaatkan jaringan yang kuat, PT. Tan Esa Gemilang memastikan barang dan produk klien dapat sampai tujuan dengan lancar dan tepat waktu, memberikan klien kami akses ke solusi yang lebih luas dan beragam.

Vision
Perusahaan

To become a trusted and leading partner in advancing agriculture and infrastructure development in Indonesia through innovative, high-quality, and reliable solutions.

We are committed to delivering excellence through innovation, engineering capability, and compliance-driven solutions-ensuring every project meets industry standards and supports sustainable national development.

Mission
Deliver Quality & Reliable Solutions

Providing high-quality agricultural machinery. infrastructure support, and construction services that meet industry standards and client expectations.

Drive Innovation & Continuous Improvement

Continuously developing and improving solutions through innovation, engineering expertise, and practical field experience.

Support National Development

Actively contributing to the growth of agriculture and infrastructure sectors in Indonesia through scalable and sustainable solutions.

Build Strong Partnerships

Establishing long-term collaborations with clients, partners, and stakeholders to create mutual value and sustainable growth.

Uphold Professionalism & Integrity

Maintaining the highest standards of integrity. responsibility, and professionalism in every project and business process.

Develop Adaptive & Growth-Oriented Team

Fostering an agile, collaborative, and continuously learning team to respond effectively to industry changes and challenges.

Our

Siap Bekerja Sama dengan Kami?

Hubungi kami sekarang untuk mendapatkan penawaran terbaik untuk kebutuhan logistik Anda.
